scripts.check:mongo: node -e "require('./backend/node_modules/dotenv').config({ path: './backend/.env' }); const mongoose = require('./backend/node_modules/mongoose'); const uri = process.env.MONGO_URI || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/biomicshub'; mongoose.connect(uri).then(async () => { console.log('mongo-ok'); await mongoose.disconnect(); }).catch((err) => { console.error(err.message || err); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.check:health: npm run check:routes && npm run check:mongo && npm run check:port && npm run check:api
